sglang.title: Small fixes for torchao quant
sglang.author: jerryzh168
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:

quantization should happen before tp (in the future ideally we can just laod quantized checkpoints, and tp can be different depending on specific deployment env)
adding _is_linear check for filter_fn

Test Plan:
python3 -m sglang.bench_one_batch --model meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B --batch-s

vllm.title: [CI/Build] simplify Dockerfile build for ARM64 / GH200
vllm.author: cennn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
From PR: 10499
Fix Issue: 2021
This contribution focuses on simplifying the Dockerfile build process for ARM64 systems. Unnecessary build from source has been removed and requirements handling has been optimized to ensure the correct installation of torch and bitsandbytes for ARM64+CUDA compatibilit

vllm.title: [Doc] Reorder vision language examples in alphabet order

vllm.bodyExcerpt: Reorder vision language examples in alphabet order, otherwise it's difficult to find the function to modify/debug in IDE during development.

vllm.title: [misc] Layerwise profile updates
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Layerwise profile - changes and updates:

Add ability to profile the scenario where the engine is processing requests of different output-lengths.

Remove --output-length from offline_profile.py CLI args.
Add sub-commands run_num_steps and run_to_completion in its place.
run_num_steps captures the u

vllm.title: [core] overhaul memory profiling and fix backward compatibility
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
fixes #10451 , and clearly explain the memory classification and the procedure.
I also added the initial pytorch memory, to be aligned with the pytorch memory profiler.
the profiling procedure is extracted into vllm/utils , so that we can use it later in v1 too.

However, this script understandably launches docker without administrative privileges and at times is it curtails the GPU profiling and tracing. The change in the document is to help the users know that if t

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add OpenAI API support for input_audio
vllm.author: kylehh

vllm.title: [V1][VLM] Proper memory profiling for image language models
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds memory profiling for image language models in V1 so that peak memory usage is correctly measured to avoid potential CUDA OOM.
A few things to note:


We still use the dummy multi_modal_data for memory profiling. This not only allows us to reuse the existing code, but is also developer-f

vllm.title: [Platform] platform agnostic for EngineArgs initialization
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
EngineArgs initialization runs before plugin loading, so it should be platform agnostic.
Once platform plugin is supported, calling platform related code during  EngineArgs initialization will lead error.
This PR clean up the platform specified code during EngineArgs initialization step.

vllm.title: [V1][Core] Use weakref.finalize instead of atexit
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt: It's nicer this way, since we no longer need to unregister shutdown from atexit

vllm.title: [Misc] Kernel Benchmark for `RMSNorm`
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR ports the RMSNorm kernel benchmark authored by @BBuf in sgl-project/sglang#2486 to vLLM repo to compare kernel differences between our custom op and flashinfer.
Co-authored-by: @BBuf
